column2: Check tracking for PO/Item number indicated by supplier
column3: Utilize FedEx website to verify tracking information shows no movement or returned to sender

Run the WIMS wizard against an item on the original PO utilizing the following Wizard Path: Select Eligible Item Indicate if CT has received item: No Select Reason of Customer Contact: Notified of a delay/issue Select Issue Diagnosis: Returned to Sender Continue Select Resolution: Replace the item with a brand-new one Confirm Shipping Address: Use same address as original shipment Continue Submit Resolution
Respond to the supplier utilizing the Ashley Reports an Item is Returned template and close the ticket under a Done resolution.
